name: claude-api
description: Claude API and SDK documentation skill for building LLM-powered applications. Use when code imports anthropic/@anthropic-ai/sdk, user asks to use the Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Managed Agents, or asks to add a Claude feature (prompt caching, tool use, thinking, streaming, etc.).
license: Complete terms in LICENSE.txt
---

# Claude API Skill

Build Claude API / Anthropic SDK applications across all supported languages.

## Supported Languages

- TypeScript (`@anthropic-ai/sdk`)
- Python (`anthropic`)
- Java
- Go
- Ruby
- C#
- PHP
- cURL

## Key Capabilities

- Messages API (single-turn and multi-turn)
- Tool Use (function calling)
- Prompt Caching
- Thinking / Extended Thinking
- Streaming (SSE and raw)
- Managed Agents (`/v1/agents`, `/v1/sessions`)
- Vision (image inputs)
- PDF support
- Batch API

## Language-Specific References

Full SDK-specific documentation is available upstream at
github.com/anthropics/skills/skills/claude-api/ with subdirectories
for each language (typescript, python, java, go, ruby, csharp, php,
curl, shared).
